title: hieracium bupleuroides subsp. cassianum
intro: Hieracium bupleuroides subsp. cassianum, also known as a lesser Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family, with yellow dandelion-like flowers and a rosette of leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium bupleuroides subsp. cassianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and roots have been used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
